_spike_notes.l_shape_description: L-shape: 100x100 bbox with 50x50 notch in top-right corner. Outer: (0,0)→(100,0)→(100,50)→(50,50)→(50,100)→(0,100).
_spike_notes.positive_control: Item 20x20 at (10,10): corners (10,10),(30,10),(30,30),(10,30) all inside L-shape. Both bbox-check and L-shape check pass.
_spike_notes.negative_control: Item 20x20 at (60,60): corners (60,60),(80,60),(80,80),(60,80) all in notch (outside L-shape). Bbox-check PASSES (60-80 inside 0-100 bbox) but L-shape check FAILS.
